name: Banana Split Brownie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: COUNTRY WOMAN MAGAZINE - JULY/AUGUST 19
1. In a large bowl, combine shortening, butter and cocoa. Stir in sugar, eggs and vanilla.
2. Combine flour, baking powder and salt; stir into egg mixture. Spread evenly over a well-greased 12-inch to 14-inch pizza pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes. Cool.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth; spread over brownie crust.
5. Drain pineapple, reserving juice; dip banana slices in juice (then discard the juice). Arrange bananas, pineapple and strawberries over cream cheese layer; sprinkle with pecans.
6. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate and butter; drizzle over top of pizza.
7. Chill for 1 hour. Refrigerate any leftovers.
